Name: Liquibase - Apply changeset
Description:
Deploy database updates using Liquibase.  You can include Liquibase in the package itself or choose Download to download it during runtime.  Use the `Report only?` option to output the SQL it will run and upload it as an Artifact.  NOTE: `Report only?` does not work with NoSQL databases such as MongoDB 

**This template is now deprecated, please use `Liquibase - Run command`**
Author: twerthi

Parameters.Name: liquibaseProLicenseKey
Parameters.Label: Pro license key
Parameters.HelpText: Enter your Liquibase Pro license key. [Request a free 30-day trial.](https://www.liquibase.com/trial) Leave blank to use the Community Edition.

Parameters.Name: liquibaseDatabaseType
Parameters.Label: Database type
Parameters.HelpText: Select the database type to deploy to.

DisplaySettings.Octopus.SelectOptions:
MariaDB|MariaDB
MongoDB|MongoDB
MySQL|MySQL
Oracle|Oracle
PostgreSQL|PostgreSQL
SqlServer|SqlServer

Parameters.Name: liquibaseChangeLogFileName
Parameters.Label: Change Log file name
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the changelog file in the package.

Parameters.Name: liquibaseServerName
Parameters.Label: Server name
Parameters.HelpText: Name or IP address of the database server.

Parameters.Name: liquibaseServerPort
Parameters.Label: Server port
Parameters.HelpText: The port the database server listens on.

Parameters.Name: liquibaseDatabaseName
Parameters.Label: Database name
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the database (or service name in case of Oracle) to deploy to.

Parameters.Name: liquibaseUsername
Parameters.Label: Username
Parameters.HelpText: Username of a user that has permission to make changes to the database.

Parameters.Name: liquibasePassword
Parameters.Label: Password
Parameters.HelpText: Password for the user with permissions to make changes to the database.

Parameters.Name: liquibaseQueryStringParameters
Parameters.Label: Connection query string parameters
Parameters.HelpText: Add additional parameters to the connection string URL. Example: ?useUnicode=true

Parameters.Name: liquibaseClassPath
Parameters.Label: Database driver path
Parameters.HelpText: Filepath to the location of the .jar driver for the database type.

Parameters.Name: liquibaseExecutablePath
Parameters.Label: Executable file path
Parameters.HelpText: File path to the Liquibase executable.

Parameters.Name: liquibaseReport
Parameters.Label: Report only?
Parameters.HelpText: This option will generate the SQL statements, save them to a file, then attach them to the step as an artifact.  This option only generates the statement, it will not run them.

Parameters.Name: liquibaseDownload
Parameters.Label: Download Liquibase?
Parameters.HelpText: Use this option to download the software necessary to deploy a Liquibase changeset.  This will download Liquibase, java, and the appropriate driver for the selected database type.  Using this option overrides the `Database driver path` and `Executable file path` inputs.

Parameters.Name: liquibaseVersion
Parameters.Label: Liquibase version
Parameters.HelpText: Used with `Download Liquibase` to specify the version of Liquibase to use.

Parameters.Name: liquibaseChangeset
Parameters.Label: Changeset package
Parameters.HelpText: Select the package with the changeset.
